candidates.title: File:Luka Modrić meets Kolinda Grabar-Kitarović after the 2018 FIFA World Cup Final (2).jpg
candidates.description: Luka Modrić (left) meets Kolinda Grabar-Kitarović (right) in the Croatian locker room at Luzhniki Stadium following the 2018 FIFA World Cup Final . Modrić was the captain of the Croatia national football team during the 2018 FIFA World Cup , and led the team to six consecutive victories in the tournament, where he scored goals against Argentina and Nigeria in the group stage. He also won the prestigious 'Golden Ball' award for best player in the tournament for his performance. Kolinda Grabar-Kitarović was the President of Croatia at the time of the 2018 FIFA World Cup, and her visit continues the tradition of heads of states of the FIFA World Cup Final participants spectating the game with the head of state of the tournament's host nation.
